hero.headline: A human who actually builds websites. With serious AI leverage.

sections.lede: No account manager. No offshore team. No "AI-powered platform" that's actually just a template engine. You talk to the person building your site. That person has spent {{OZ_FILL: years of web/platform experience}} shipping web platforms at the depth most agencies outsource.

whats_changed.headline: What's changed
whats_changed.body: AI makes one competent operator do the work of a small team — and at a small-team fraction of the cost. That's what lets Squared charge less without cutting corners. It's not magic. It's leverage, and you get the benefit.

items.title: You get craft
items.description: Design decisions, code quality, and opinionated choices made by a human who cares what good looks like.

items.title: You get speed
items.description: Tasks that used to take a team now take one operator with proper AI tooling.

why_square.headline: Why Square
why_square.body: We kept building our own projects on Square because it's already good at the hard stuff — payments, inventory, customers, bookings. What Square isn't good at is letting you build a site that looks like your actual business. That's where Squared came from.

who_its_for.headline: Who it's for
items: Cafés, retail, salons, personal trainers, small multi-location operators — anyone already on Square who's hit Squarespace's ceiling or bounced off Shopify's costs.
Not for: enterprises, non-Square businesses, or "just a landing page" jobs.
